messages.content: 什么是暗物质
dark matter is invisible matter that does not emit absorb or reflect light but its existence is inferred from gravitational effects on visible matter it makes up about 27 percent of the universe
什么是光合作用
photosynthesis is the process by which plants convert sunlight water and carbon dioxide into glucose and oxygen it is the foundation of most food chains and produces the oxygen we breathe

explain in chinese: a black hole is a region of spacetime where gravity is so strong that nothing not even light can escape it forms when a massive star collapses at the end of its life the boundary is called the event horizon
什么是黑洞

explain in chinese: quantum entanglement is a phenomenon where two particles become connected so that the quantum state of one instantly determines the state of the other regardless of distance einstein called it spooky action at a distance
什么是量子纠缠
DNA是什么

dna or deoxyribonucleic acid is a molecule that carries the genetic instructions for life it is shaped like a double helix and contains four bases adenine thymine guanine and cytosine that encode biological information

explain in chinese: antibiotics are medicines that fight bacterial infections by killing bacteria or stopping their growth they do not work against viruses overuse can lead to antibiotic resistance which is a major health threat
什么是抗生素

explain in chinese: relativity is einstein theory that space and time are interconnected special relativity shows that time slows for fast moving objects and general relativity describes gravity as the curvature of spacetime
什么是相对论

explain in chinese: dark matter is invisible matter that does not emit absorb or reflect light but its existence is inferred from gravitational effects on visible matter it makes up about 27 percent of the universe
什么是暗物质
什么是温室效应

the greenhouse effect occurs when gases in the atmosphere trap heat from the sun making earth warmer while natural greenhouse effect makes life possible human activities have intensified it causing climate change

explain in chinese: a neuron is a nerve cell that transmits electrical and chemical signals in the brain the human brain has about 86 billion neurons connected by trillions of synapses forming the basis of thought and consciousness
什么是神经元

explain in chinese: evolution by natural selection is darwin theory that organisms with traits better suited to their environment survive and reproduce more successfully over time this leads to the gradual change of species
什么是进化论
